queries.question: Empirical analysis of loan duration in months as a determinant of credit risk reduction and its impact on default probability.

queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: no checking account.
queries.question: Empirical investigation into the absence of a checking account as a significant credit risk driver and its contribution to increased default probability.

queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: balance below 0 DM.
queries.question: Empirical analysis of checking account balances below zero as a determinant of credit risk mitigation and its association with lower default probability.
